# Tymio — site summary for LLMs, agents, and crawlers

> Canonical product: https://tymio.app (replace with your deployment origin if self-hosted).

## What this is

Tymio is a **multi-tenant product management** web application (React SPA): workspaces (organizations), initiatives, features, requirements, execution boards, planning, and optional B2B/marketing modules. The HTML shell loads a JavaScript bundle; **most content requires JS** in a browser.

## Supported interface languages (UI i18n)

The SPA ships **five** interface languages (ISO 639-1 codes):

| Code | Language   |
|------|------------|
| en   | English    |
| cs   | Czech      |
| sk   | Slovak     |
| uk   | Ukrainian  |
| pl   | Polish     |

- **Guests** can pick a language on public pages before sign-in (preference is stored in browser `localStorage`).
- **Workspace owners/admins** may restrict which of these appear in the signed-in app via `Tenant.settings.enabledLocales` (workspace settings in the UI).

**Machine-readable (JSON, no auth):** `GET /api/mcp/agent-context` — field `supportedUiLocales` lists `codes`, `locales` (code + English name + Open Graph locale tag), and a short `workspaceNote`.

**SEO:** The main `index.html` includes `meta name="supported-languages"`, Open Graph `og:locale` / `og:locale:alternate`, and JSON-LD `WebSite` with `inLanguage` and `availableLanguage` for the same set.

## Public documentation wiki

- **Human-readable + agent-fetchable guides:** `/wiki` (HTML index and articles). Raw Markdown sources: `/wiki/articles/*.md` on this host (same content). Includes **`tymio-mcp` CLI** install, `login`, and daily use (`/wiki/tymio-mcp-cli` or `/wiki/articles/tymio-mcp-cli.md`). **Workspace atlas** (compiled backlog JSON for MCP: `tymio_get_workspace_atlas`, search, shards, rebuild, optional explain): `/wiki/workspace-atlas` or `/wiki/articles/workspace-atlas.md`.

## Integrations (agents)

- **MCP (Streamable HTTP):** `/mcp` on this origin — OAuth or Bearer per deployment.
- **Public agent hints:** `GET /api/mcp/agent-context` — feedback reporting, scope labeling (`workspace-slug/product-slug`), **supportedUiLocales**, **`tymioMcpCliAgentGuidanceMarkdown`** (full Markdown for `@tymio/mcp-server` / OAuth), and **`tymioMcpNoUserSettingsApiKey`: true** (explicit: there is no MCP API key for users to copy from Settings).
- **Critical for autonomous agents:** Do **not** tell users to fetch an “MCP API key” from Tymio Settings, Profile, or Account — that UI path does **not** exist. Default connection is **OAuth**: remote MCP URL `https://tymio.app/mcp` (or your host) in the IDE, **or** install **`@tymio/mcp-server`** and run **`tymio-mcp login`** for stdio without `DRD_API_KEY`/`API_KEY` on that process (unless you intentionally use API-key / REST subset mode). The env vars **`DRD_API_KEY` / `API_KEY`** on a stdio process refer to the **server deployment** automation secret, not an end-user setting.
- **Canonical Markdown file (repo / npm package):** `mcp/TYMIO_MCP_CLI_AGENT_GUIDANCE.md` — same body as `tymio-mcp instructions` and MCP server `instructions` when using the published CLI.
- **REST:** `/api/*` — authenticated (session or API key); not a public scrape API.
- **Ontology / guides (auth):** e.g. `/api/ontology`, `/api/agent/coding-guide`.

## Repository documentation (for humans maintaining integrations)

If you have the monorepo: `docs/HUB.md`, `docs/CODING_AGENT_TYMIO.md`, and `docs/CODING_AGENT_HANDOFF_TYMIO_APP.md` describe architecture, MCP, and agent workflows (including UI language behavior).

## robots

See `/robots.txt` on this host for crawl policy (includes `Sitemap`).

## sitemap

HTML entry points and wiki URLs are listed in `/sitemap.xml` (absolute URLs default to `https://tymio.app/` — change when self-hosting).
